name: talk_to_agent
description: Use this tool ANY time you need to ask another agent a question or request information from another agent. NEVER answer on behalf of another agent without using this tool. If this tool returns a failure, you MUST tell the user that the other agent could not be reached — do not guess or make up an answer.

target_agent.description: Identifier of the agent to contact (e.g. 'weather-agent', 'billing-agent', 'search-agent'). Use GET /agents to discover available agents.

message.description: The message or question to send to the target agent. Can be plain text or a structured JSON string with routing info (e.g. {"path": "/weather", "params": {"city": "London"}})

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a response. Default: 10000 (10 seconds).
